ddls:
CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the officer */,
  "officer_race" TEXT /* Race of the officer */,
  "officer_badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "officer_department" TEXT /* Department of the officer */,
  "officer_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "officer_years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_age" INTEGER /* Age of the driver */,
  "driver_race" TEXT /* Race of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "driver_license_state" TEXT /* State of the driver's license */,
  "driver_insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_license_plate_state" TEXT /* State of the vehicle's license plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation type */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code of the violation */,
  "violation_points" INTEGER /* Points of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_raw" TEXT /* Raw text of the stop location */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City of the stop location */,
  "location_state" TEXT /* State of the stop location */,
  "location_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the stop location */,
  "location_county" TEXT /* County of the stop location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_stops" (
  "stop_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the traffic stop */,
  "stop_date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic stop */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic stop */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver involved */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who made the stop */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation */,
  "stop_outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop outcome */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "stop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stop */,
  "stop_result" TEXT /* Result of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stops_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stops_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stops_stop_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_outcome_id") REFERENCES stop_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stops_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stops_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stops_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_violations" (
  "stop_violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-violation pair */,
  "stop_id" TEXT /* ID of the traffic stop */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_violations_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES traffic_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_violations_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "stop_id" TEXT /* ID of the traffic stop */,
  "citation_number" TEXT /* Number of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES traffic_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "stop_id" TEXT /* ID of the traffic stop */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES traffic_stops ("stop_id")
)
column_names: Years of service of the officer
State of the vehicle's license plate
Unique identifier for each violation type
Unique identifier for each stop outcome
Raw text of the stop location
Zip code of the stop location
Unique identifier for the traffic stop
ID of the officer who made the stop
Unique identifier for each stop-violation pair
